query:
INSERT INTO appLinks (name, url, category, emoji, description) VALUES
  ('Photomath', 'https://photomath.com', 'school', '📷', 'Camera-based math problem solver'),
  ('Kahoot!', 'https://kahoot.com', 'school', '🎯', 'Quiz games'),
  ('Class Dojo', 'https://www.classdojo.com', 'school', '👋', 'Behavior tracking + parent messaging'),
  ('Starfall', 'https://www.starfall.com', 'reading', '⭐', 'Reading, phonics, and math'),
  ('Clever', 'https://clever.com', 'school', '🍀', 'School SSO portal (adult use)'),
  ('Google Classroom', 'https://classroom.google.com', 'google', '🏫', 'Assignment hub'),
  ('Ohio Learning Standards', 'https://education.ohio.gov/Topics/Learning-in-Ohio/Learning-Standards', 'learning', '🏛️', 'Ohio Department of Education — what each grade is supposed to cover'),
  ('Kimi AI', 'https://kimi.com', 'learning', '🤖', 'AI tutor + chat assistant');

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM appLinks;
